# ARM SME / SME2 Quick Reference

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_arm_intrinsics_manual.py. Do not edit manually. -->

面向 streaming / ZA / slice 场景的 SME / SME2 quick reference，聚焦函数属性、ZA ownership、ZA 初始化和常用矩阵累加入口。

## Headers and Feature Gates

| Header | Feature Gate | Typical Use |
| --- | --- | --- |
| <arm_sme.h> | `__ARM_FEATURE_SME` | 声明 streaming 上下文 |
| <arm_sme.h> | `__ARM_FEATURE_SME`, `__ARM_FEATURE_SVE` | inline asm beta 路径合并 |
| <arm_sme.h> | `__ARM_FEATURE_SME2` | 对 ZA slice 做多向量写入/累加 |

## Streaming Mode and ZA Ownership

| Attribute | Maps To | Use For | Key Constraint |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `__arm_streaming` | `attribute` | 声明 streaming 上下文 | Use when the function body contains SME-only intrinsics that require streaming mode. |
| `__arm_streaming_compatible` | `attribute` | 声明 streaming 上下文 | Use when the function or intrinsic is specified as compatible with streaming and non-streaming callers. |
| `__arm_inout("za")` | `attribute` | 声明 ZA ownership | Use when the function receives an existing ZA state and updates it in place. |
| `__arm_new("za")` | `attribute` | 声明 ZA ownership | Use when the current function is responsible for creating a new ZA state. |
| `__arm_out("za")` | `attribute` | 声明 ZA ownership | Use when the function writes a new ZA result that the caller continues to use. |

## Default Streaming-Compatible Pattern

```c
#include <arm_sme.h>
#include <stdint.h>

void add_arrays_f32_sme(const float *a, const float *b, float *out, int n) __arm_streaming;
void add_arrays_f32_sme(const float *a, const float *b, float *out, int n) {
    const int vl = (int)svcntw();
    for (int i = 0; i < n; i += vl) {
        svbool_t pg = svwhilelt_b32((uint64_t)i, (uint64_t)n);
        svfloat32_t va = svld1_f32(pg, a + i);
        svfloat32_t vb = svld1_f32(pg, b + i);
        svfloat32_t vc = svadd_f32_x(pg, va, vb);
        svst1_f32(pg, out + i, vc);
    }
}
```

## ZA Initialization and Accumulation

| Intrinsic | Maps To | Use For | Key Constraint |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `svzero_za()` | `ZERO` | 初始化 ZA | Use only when the function owns a fresh ZA state or explicitly outputs a new ZA result. |
| `svmopa_za32_s8_m` | `SMOPA`, `FMOPA` | outer-product 累加到 ZA | Only enter this path when tile layout, ZA ownership and write-back boundaries are explicit. |
| `svadd_write_za32_s32_vg1x2` | `ADD` | 对 ZA slice 做多向量写入/累加 | Gate the path on __ARM_FEATURE_SME2 and keep the function in streaming mode. |

## SME ZA Inline ASM Instructions

| Instruction | Maps To | Use For | Key Constraint |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `SMSTART ZA` | `SMSTART` | 显式管理 ZA 可访问范围 | Use inside an SME streaming function; prefer __arm_streaming on both declaration and definition. |
| `SMSTOP ZA` | `SMSTOP` | 显式管理 ZA 可访问范围 | Use inside an SME streaming function; prefer __arm_streaming on both declaration and definition. |
| `ZERO {ZA}` | `ZERO` | inline asm fresh-ZA 清零 | Use inside an SME streaming function; prefer __arm_streaming on both declaration and definition. |
| `PTRUE Pd.S` | `PTRUE` | inline asm 生成 tile 谓词 | Use inside an SME streaming function; prefer __arm_streaming on both declaration and definition. |
| `WHILELO Pd.S` | `WHILELO` | inline asm 生成 tile 谓词 | Use inside an SME streaming function; prefer __arm_streaming on both declaration and definition. |
| `LD1W Z.S predicated` | `LD1W` | inline asm 谓词化载入 | Use inside an SME streaming function; prefer __arm_streaming on both declaration and definition. |
| `FMOPA ZA.S` | `FMOPA` | inline asm 外积累加到 ZA | Use inside an SME streaming function; prefer __arm_streaming on both declaration and definition. |
| `MOVA ZA0H.S slice to Z` | `MOVA` | inline asm 读出 ZA slice | Use inside an SME streaming function; prefer __arm_streaming on both declaration and definition. |
| `ST1W ZA0H.S slice` | `ST1W` | inline asm 写回 ZA slice | Use inside an SME streaming function; prefer __arm_streaming on both declaration and definition. |
| `FADD Z.S predicated` | `FADD` | inline asm beta 路径合并 | Use inside an SME streaming function; prefer __arm_streaming on both declaration and definition. |
| `FMLA Z.S predicated` | `FMLA` | inline asm beta 路径合并 | Use inside an SME streaming function; prefer __arm_streaming on both declaration and definition. |

## Standalone ZA SGEMM Inline ASM Pattern

```c
#include <arm_sme.h>
#include <stddef.h>
#include <stdint.h>
#include <string.h>

static void sgemm_tile_za_inline(
    int row_count, int col_count, int k,
    const float *a_work, const float *b_panel,
    float *c_tile, int ldc, float beta) __arm_streaming;
static void sgemm_tile_za_inline(
    int row_count, int col_count, int k,
    const float *a_work, const float *b_panel,
    float *c_tile, int ldc, float beta) __arm_streaming {
    __asm__ volatile(
        "smstart za\n"
        "zero {za}\n"
        :
        :
        : "memory", "za"
    );

    for (int kk = 0; kk < k; ++kk) {
        const float *a_vec = a_work + (size_t)kk * row_count;
        const float *b_vec = b_panel + (size_t)kk * col_count;
        __asm__ volatile(
            "whilelo p0.s, xzr, %x[row_count]\n"
            "whilelo p1.s, xzr, %x[col_count]\n"
            "ld1w { z0.s }, p0/z, [%[a_vec]]\n"
            "ld1w { z1.s }, p1/z, [%[b_vec]]\n"
            "fmopa za0.s, p0/m, p1/m, z0.s, z1.s\n"
            :
            : [a_vec] "r"(a_vec),
              [b_vec] "r"(b_vec),
              [row_count] "r"((uint64_t)row_count),
              [col_count] "r"((uint64_t)col_count)
            : "memory", "p0", "p1", "z0", "z1", "za"
        );
    }

    uint32_t beta_bits;
    memcpy(&beta_bits, &beta, sizeof(beta_bits));
    for (int tile_row = 0; tile_row < row_count; ++tile_row) {
        float *c_row = c_tile + (size_t)tile_row * ldc;
        if (beta == 0.0f) {
            __asm__ volatile(
                "whilelo p1.s, xzr, %x[col_count]\n"
                "mov w12, %w[tile_row]\n"
                "st1w {za0h.s[w12, 0]}, p1, [%[c_row]]\n"
                :
                : [col_count] "r"((uint64_t)col_count),
                  [tile_row] "r"(tile_row),
                  [c_row] "r"(c_row)
                : "memory", "p1", "w12", "za"
            );
        } else {
            __asm__ volatile(
                "whilelo p1.s, xzr, %x[col_count]\n"
                "mov w12, %w[tile_row]\n"
                "mova z2.s, p1/m, za0h.s[w12, 0]\n"
                "ld1w { z3.s }, p1/z, [%[c_row]]\n"
                "dup z4.s, %w[beta_bits]\n"
                "fmla z2.s, p1/m, z3.s, z4.s\n"
                "st1w { z2.s }, p1, [%[c_row]]\n"
                :
                : [col_count] "r"((uint64_t)col_count),
                  [tile_row] "r"(tile_row),
                  [c_row] "r"(c_row),
                  [beta_bits] "r"(beta_bits)
                : "memory", "p1", "z2", "z3", "z4", "w12", "za"
            );
        }
    }

    __asm__ volatile(
        "smstop za\n"
        :
        :
        : "memory", "za"
    );
}
```

Canonical ZA slice store placeholder: `st1w {za0h.s[...]}`. Clang may print the MOVA alias as `mov z*.s, p*/m, za*h.s[...]` in emitted assembly.

## Inline ASM Forbidden Items

- Do not emit weak stubs for `__arm_tpidr2_save`, `__arm_tpidr2_restore` or `__arm_za_disable`.
- Do not use `__arm_new("za")` in standalone generated source unless the target link environment has already proved those support routines exist.
- Do not return `success=true` without compile, link, assembly scan and unresolved-symbol scan results.

## Inline ASM Validation Commands

```bash
clang -std=c11 -O3 -march=armv9.2-a+sme -msve-vector-bits=scalable -S candidate.c -o candidate.s
rg 'smstart[[:space:]]+za|zero[[:space:]]+\{za\}|fmopa|st1w|smstop[[:space:]]+za' candidate.s
rg '__arm_tpidr2|__arm_za_disable' candidate.s
clang -std=c11 -O3 -march=armv9.2-a+sme -msve-vector-bits=scalable candidate.c driver.c -o candidate.compare
nm -u candidate.compare | rg '__arm_tpidr2|__arm_za_disable'
```

## ZA Entry Checklist

- Enter ZA/tile only for explicit GEMM, rank-k or outer-product style two-dimensional accumulation.
- Keep elementwise, masked elementwise, sum/dot reduction and GEMV on NEON, SVE or SME streaming-compatible paths.
- A ZA/tile response must state output tile mapping, row/column dimensions, K accumulation dimension, ZA ownership, boundary predication and write-back timing.
- Inline asm ZA responses must state the `smstart za` / `smstop za` range, `zero {za}` timing, `fmopa` predicates, `st1w {za0h.s[...]}` write-back and clobbers.
- If any tile mapping or ownership detail is unclear, reject the ZA path or fall back to streaming-compatible code.

## Common Pitfalls

- `Do not mix NEON, SVE and SME templates in one kernel body`: Calling vld1q_f32 and svld1_f32 in the same loop body.
- `Do not fake SME ABI support routines with weak stubs`: Adding weak stubs to make an executable link while silently disabling the real SME ABI contract.
- `SME ZA inline asm must be standalone and scan-verifiable`: Returning success for inline asm that was not compiled, linked and scanned.
- `SME intrinsics must appear in a streaming-capable context`: Calling svmopa_* or svadd_write_za* from a plain C function with no streaming attribute.
- `svzero_za() requires fresh-ZA intent or explicit ZA output`: Zeroing ZA in a kernel that should preserve or continue caller-owned accumulation.
- `ZA intrinsics must declare ownership at the function boundary`: Calling ZA intrinsics while omitting all of __arm_inout("za"), __arm_new("za") and __arm_out("za").
- `SVE and SME intrinsics must include the matching header`: Using svld1_f32 or svzero_za() with no Arm SVE or SME header include.

## Quick Lookup

### `__arm_streaming`

- `Maps To`: `attribute`
- `Prototype`: `void kernel(...) __arm_streaming;`
- `Header`: `<arm_sme.h>`
- `Feature Gate`: `__ARM_FEATURE_SME`
- `Use When`: 声明 streaming 上下文
- `Key Rule`: Use when the function body contains SME-only intrinsics that require streaming mode.
- `Common Mistake`: Calling ZA or SME tile intrinsics without a streaming-capable function context.
- `Example`:
```c
void kernel(...) __arm_streaming;
```

- `Source`: [Arm C Language Extensions](https://arm-software.github.io/acle/main/acle.html) / SME language extensions and intrinsics / SME keyword attributes related to streaming mode / 2026-05-12

### `__arm_streaming_compatible`

- `Maps To`: `attribute`
- `Prototype`: `void helper(...) __arm_streaming_compatible;`
- `Header`: `<arm_sme.h>`
- `Feature Gate`: `__ARM_FEATURE_SME`
- `Use When`: 声明 streaming 上下文
- `Key Rule`: Use when the function or intrinsic is specified as compatible with streaming and non-streaming callers.
- `Common Mistake`: Using __arm_streaming_compatible to hide a missing ZA ownership contract.
- `Example`:
```c
void zero_za_wrapper(...) __arm_streaming_compatible;
```

- `Source`: [Arm C Language Extensions](https://arm-software.github.io/acle/main/acle.html) / SME language extensions and intrinsics / SME keyword attributes related to streaming mode / 2026-05-12

### `__arm_inout("za")`

- `Maps To`: `attribute`
- `Prototype`: `void kernel(...) __arm_inout("za");`
- `Header`: `<arm_sme.h>`
- `Feature Gate`: `__ARM_FEATURE_SME`
- `Required Attributes`: `__arm_streaming`
- `Use When`: 声明 ZA ownership
- `Key Rule`: Use when the function receives an existing ZA state and updates it in place.
- `Common Mistake`: Adding __arm_inout("za") without any ZA state flowing across the call boundary.
- `Example`:
```c
void kernel(...) __arm_streaming __arm_inout("za");
```

- `Source`: [Arm C Language Extensions](https://arm-software.github.io/acle/main/acle.html) / SME language extensions and intrinsics / SME ZA state assertions / 2026-05-12

### `__arm_new("za")`

- `Maps To`: `attribute`
- `Prototype`: `void kernel(...) __arm_new("za");`
- `Header`: `<arm_sme.h>`
- `Feature Gate`: `__ARM_FEATURE_SME`
- `Required Attributes`: `__arm_streaming`
- `Use When`: 声明 ZA ownership
- `Key Rule`: Use when the current function is responsible for creating a new ZA state.
- `Common Mistake`: Using __arm_new("za") when the function actually consumes an incoming ZA tile state.
- `Example`:
```c
void kernel(...) __arm_streaming __arm_new("za");
```

- `Source`: [Arm C Language Extensions](https://arm-software.github.io/acle/main/acle.html) / SME language extensions and intrinsics / SME ZA state assertions / 2026-05-12

### `__arm_out("za")`

- `Maps To`: `attribute`
- `Prototype`: `void kernel(...) __arm_out("za");`
- `Header`: `<arm_sme.h>`
- `Feature Gate`: `__ARM_FEATURE_SME`
- `Required Attributes`: `__arm_streaming`
- `Use When`: 声明 ZA ownership
- `Key Rule`: Use when the function writes a new ZA result that the caller continues to use.
- `Common Mistake`: Using __arm_out("za") for a function that never exposes ZA state to its caller.
- `Example`:
```c
void kernel(...) __arm_streaming __arm_out("za");
```

- `Source`: [Arm C Language Extensions](https://arm-software.github.io/acle/main/acle.html) / SME language extensions and intrinsics / SME ZA state assertions / 2026-05-12

### `svzero_za()`

- `Maps To`: `ZERO`
- `Prototype`: `void svzero_za(void) __arm_streaming_compatible __arm_out("za")`
- `Header`: `<arm_sme.h>`
- `Feature Gate`: `__ARM_FEATURE_SME`
- `Required Attributes`: `__arm_streaming_compatible`, `__arm_out("za")`
- `Use When`: 初始化 ZA
- `Key Rule`: Use only when the function owns a fresh ZA state or explicitly outputs a new ZA result.
- `Common Mistake`: Calling svzero_za() inside a streaming kernel that should reuse caller-owned ZA state.
- `Example`:
```c
svzero_za();
```

- `Source`: [Arm C Language Extensions](https://arm-software.github.io/acle/main/acle.html) / SME language extensions and intrinsics / SME instruction intrinsics / ZERO / 2026-05-12

### `svmopa_za32_s8_m`

- `Maps To`: `SMOPA`, `FMOPA`
- `Prototype`: `void svmopa_za32_s8_m(uint64_t tile, svbool_t pn, svbool_t pm, svint8_t zn, svint8_t zm) __arm_streaming __arm_inout("za")`
- `Header`: `<arm_sme.h>`
- `Feature Gate`: `__ARM_FEATURE_SME`
- `Required Attributes`: `__arm_streaming`, `__arm_inout("za")`
- `Use When`: outer-product 累加到 ZA
- `Key Rule`: Only enter this path when tile layout, ZA ownership and write-back boundaries are explicit.
- `Common Mistake`: Using svmopa_za32_s8_m in an elementwise add/mul kernel.
- `Example`:
```c
svmopa_za32_s8_m(tile, pn, pm, lhs_i8, rhs_i8);
```

- `Source`: [Arm C Language Extensions](https://arm-software.github.io/acle/main/acle.html) / SME language extensions and intrinsics / SME instruction intrinsics / BFMOPA, FMOPA (widening), SMOPA, UMOPA / 2026-05-12

### `svadd_write_za32_s32_vg1x2`

- `Maps To`: `ADD`
- `Prototype`: `void svadd_write_za32_s32_vg1x2(uint32_t slice, svint32x2_t zn, svint32x2_t zm) __arm_streaming __arm_inout("za")`
- `Header`: `<arm_sme.h>`
- `Feature Gate`: `__ARM_FEATURE_SME2`
- `Required Attributes`: `__arm_streaming`, `__arm_inout("za")`
- `Use When`: 对 ZA slice 做多向量写入/累加
- `Key Rule`: Gate the path on __ARM_FEATURE_SME2 and keep the function in streaming mode.
- `Common Mistake`: Using SME2 ZA slice intrinsics in a plain SVE streaming loop with no ZA state.
- `Example`:
```c
svadd_write_za32_s32_vg1x2(slice, lhs_group, rhs_group);
```

- `Source`: [Arm C Language Extensions](https://arm-software.github.io/acle/main/acle.html) / SME language extensions and intrinsics / SME2 instruction intrinsics / ADD, SUB (store into ZA, multi) / 2026-05-12

### `SMSTART ZA`

- `Maps To`: `SMSTART`
- `Prototype`: `smstart za`
- `Header`: `<arm_sme.h>`
- `Feature Gate`: `__ARM_FEATURE_SME`
- `Required Attributes`: `__arm_streaming`
- `Use When`: 显式管理 ZA 可访问范围
- `Key Rule`: Use inside an SME streaming function; prefer __arm_streaming on both declaration and definition.
- `Common Mistake`: Adding weak __arm_tpidr2_* or __arm_za_disable stubs to hide missing SME ABI runtime support.
- `Example`:
```c
__asm__ volatile(
    "smstart za\n"
    :
    :
    : "memory", "za"
);
```

- `Source`: [Arm A-profile A64 Instruction Set Architecture / DDI0602](https://developer.arm.com/documentation/ddi0602/latest/SME-Instructions) / SMSTART ZA; DDI0602 reference-only when developer.arm.com blocks scripted access; Arm SME introduction blog cross-checks SMSTART/SMSTOP semantics. / 2026-05-12

### `ZERO {ZA}`

- `Maps To`: `ZERO`
- `Prototype`: `zero {za}`
- `Header`: `<arm_sme.h>`
- `Feature Gate`: `__ARM_FEATURE_SME`
- `Required Attributes`: `__arm_streaming`
- `Use When`: inline asm fresh-ZA 清零
- `Key Rule`: Use inside an SME streaming function; prefer __arm_streaming on both declaration and definition.
- `Common Mistake`: Adding weak __arm_tpidr2_* or __arm_za_disable stubs to hide missing SME ABI runtime support.
- `Example`:
```c
__asm__ volatile(
    "zero {za}\n"
    :
    :
    : "memory", "za"
);
```

- `Source`: [Arm A-profile A64 Instruction Set Architecture / DDI0602](https://developer.arm.com/documentation/ddi0602/latest/SME-Instructions) / ZERO {ZA}; DDI0602 reference-only when developer.arm.com blocks scripted access; Arm SME Instructions blog describes ZERO {ZA} as the whole-ZA alias. / 2026-05-12

### `FMOPA ZA.S`

- `Maps To`: `FMOPA`
- `Prototype`: `fmopa <ZAda>.S, <Pn>/M, <Pm>/M, <Zn>.S, <Zm>.S`
- `Header`: `<arm_sme.h>`
- `Feature Gate`: `__ARM_FEATURE_SME`
- `Required Attributes`: `__arm_streaming`
- `Use When`: inline asm 外积累加到 ZA
- `Key Rule`: Use inside an SME streaming function; prefer __arm_streaming on both declaration and definition.
- `Common Mistake`: Adding weak __arm_tpidr2_* or __arm_za_disable stubs to hide missing SME ABI runtime support.
- `Example`:
```c
__asm__ volatile(
    "whilelo p0.s, xzr, %x[row_count]\n"
    "whilelo p1.s, xzr, %x[col_count]\n"
    "ld1w { z0.s }, p0/z, [%[a_work]]\n"
    "ld1w { z1.s }, p1/z, [%[b_ptr]]\n"
    "fmopa za0.s, p0/m, p1/m, z0.s, z1.s\n"
    :
    : [a_work] "r"(a_work),
      [b_ptr] "r"(b_ptr),
      [row_count] "r"(row_count),
      [col_count] "r"(col_count)
    : "memory", "p0", "p1", "z0", "z1", "za"
);
```

- `Source`: [Arm A-profile A64 Instruction Set Architecture / DDI0602](https://developer.arm.com/documentation/ddi0602/latest/SME-Instructions) / FMOPA (non-widening), FP32 form; DDI0602 reference-only when developer.arm.com blocks scripted access; Arm SME Instructions blog gives FMOPA <ZAda>.S, <Pn>/M, <Pm>/M, <Zn>.S, <Zm>.S. / 2026-05-12

### `ST1W ZA0H.S slice`

- `Maps To`: `ST1W`
- `Prototype`: `st1w { za0h.s[<Wv>, #<imm>] }, <Pg>, [<Xn|SP>]`
- `Header`: `<arm_sme.h>`
- `Feature Gate`: `__ARM_FEATURE_SME`
- `Required Attributes`: `__arm_streaming`
- `Use When`: inline asm 写回 ZA slice
- `Key Rule`: Use inside an SME streaming function; prefer __arm_streaming on both declaration and definition.
- `Common Mistake`: Adding weak __arm_tpidr2_* or __arm_za_disable stubs to hide missing SME ABI runtime support.
- `Example`:
```c
__asm__ volatile(
    "whilelo p1.s, xzr, %x[col_count]\n"
    "mov w12, %w[tile_row]\n"
    "st1w {za0h.s[w12, 0]}, p1, [%[c_row]]\n"
    :
    : [col_count] "r"(col_count),
      [tile_row] "r"(tile_row),
      [c_row] "r"(c_row)
    : "memory", "p1", "w12", "za"
);
```

- `Source`: [Arm A-profile A64 Instruction Set Architecture / DDI0602](https://developer.arm.com/documentation/ddi0602/latest/SME-Instructions) / ST1W (ZA tile slice store); DDI0602 reference-only when developer.arm.com blocks scripted access; Arm ACLE exposes SME ST1W instruction intrinsics. / 2026-05-12

### `MOVA ZA0H.S slice to Z`

- `Maps To`: `MOVA`
- `Prototype`: `mova <Zd>.S, <Pg>/M, ZA0H.S[<Wv>, #<imm>]`
- `Header`: `<arm_sme.h>`
- `Feature Gate`: `__ARM_FEATURE_SME`
- `Required Attributes`: `__arm_streaming`
- `Use When`: inline asm 读出 ZA slice
- `Key Rule`: Use inside an SME streaming function; prefer __arm_streaming on both declaration and definition.
- `Common Mistake`: Adding weak __arm_tpidr2_* or __arm_za_disable stubs to hide missing SME ABI runtime support.
- `Example`:
```c
__asm__ volatile(
    "whilelo p1.s, xzr, %x[col_count]\n"
    "mov w12, %w[tile_row]\n"
    "mova z2.s, p1/m, za0h.s[w12, 0]\n"
    :
    : [col_count] "r"(col_count),
      [tile_row] "r"(tile_row)
    : "memory", "p1", "z2", "w12", "za"
);
```

- `Source`: [Arm A-profile A64 Instruction Set Architecture / DDI0602](https://developer.arm.com/documentation/ddi0602/latest/SME-Instructions) / MOVA (ZA tile slice move); DDI0602 reference-only when developer.arm.com blocks scripted access; Arm SME Instructions blog describes vector-to/from-tile slice moves. / 2026-05-12

### `FMLA Z.S predicated`

- `Maps To`: `FMLA`
- `Prototype`: `fmla <Zda>.S, <Pg>/M, <Zn>.S, <Zm>.S`
- `Header`: `<arm_sme.h>`
- `Feature Gate`: `__ARM_FEATURE_SME`, `__ARM_FEATURE_SVE`
- `Required Attributes`: `__arm_streaming`
- `Use When`: inline asm beta 路径合并
- `Key Rule`: Use inside an SME streaming function; prefer __arm_streaming on both declaration and definition.
- `Common Mistake`: Adding weak __arm_tpidr2_* or __arm_za_disable stubs to hide missing SME ABI runtime support.
- `Example`:
```c
__asm__ volatile(
    "mova z2.s, p1/m, za0h.s[w12, 0]\n"
    "ld1w { z3.s }, p1/z, [%[c_row]]\n"
    "dup z4.s, %w[beta_bits]\n"
    "fmla z2.s, p1/m, z3.s, z4.s\n"
    "st1w { z2.s }, p1, [%[c_row]]\n"
    :
    : [c_row] "r"(c_row),
      [beta_bits] "r"(beta_bits)
    : "memory", "z2", "z3", "z4", "p1", "za"
);
```

- `Source`: [Arm A-profile A64 Instruction Set Architecture / DDI0602](https://developer.arm.com/documentation/ddi0602/latest/SVE-Instructions) / FMLA (SVE predicated vector form usable in Streaming SVE mode); DDI0602 reference-only when developer.arm.com blocks scripted access. / 2026-05-12
